creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #16)
> Multitouch version attached. I hope it works

Yep - this is working fine for me. This is the best version yet - I have two finger scroll and click-and-drag both working, regardless of whether or not my drag finger was on the touchpad before I click or not. Thank you!
